records.name: Silent Lockdown
records.summary: The target site does not sound alarms; it quietly seals routes and updates internal maps.

records.name: Weaponized Sympathy
records.summary: A bystander or dependent is present specifically to make violence costly.

records.name: Counter-Leak
records.summary: An enemy starts releasing edited footage that reframes the crew as terrorists.

records.name: Trace Bloom
records.summary: Each network action leaves a compounding trail that improves future enemy responses.

records.name: Storm Surge
records.summary: Neon rain turns streets into reflectivity mazes and shorts cheap hardware.

records.name: Friendly Betrayal
records.summary: An ally sells partial truth, not because they hate the crew but because they are cornered.

records.name: Supply-Side Violence
records.summary: The real target is not the objective but the spare parts pipeline behind it.

records.name: Ghost Claim
records.summary: Two different factions both insist the same person or object legally belongs to them.

records.name: Hot Biometric
records.summary: Someone on the crew already appears in a current citywide watchlist.

records.name: Mercy Trigger
records.summary: A piece of medical hardware fails unless the crew diverts power or resources to it.
